HELD - no payload published. Two independent, sufficient reasons. (1) No genuine English-taught international programme found at any level: fiep.bmstu.ru's own 'All programmes' page lists every Bachelor's/Specialist/Master's track under standard Russian federal classifier codes only (e.g. 24.03.01, 09.03.04), FIEP runs a mandatory 10-month Russian-language Preparatory Department for foreign students before they can join these Russian-medium degrees, and Wikipedia confirms admissions exams are held in math/physics/Russian -- Bachelor's/Specialist level is Russian-medium, not English-taught. A secondary-source claim of 'nine English-taught Master's programmes' could not be corroborated on any bmstu.ru/fiep.bmstu.ru page and is directly contradicted by Studyportals' own Mastersportal.com index, which shows 'Browse 0 Masters at Bauman Moscow State Technical University' -- even if real, lib/data/program-taxonomy.ts has zero Master's-level Engineering canonical slugs (same gap as ITMO/MIPT/Innopolis tonight), and Bauman has no MBA/business programme to map to the Business stream. (2) Bauman Moscow State Technical University itself (not an affiliate) is on the U.S. Treasury OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) List, added 2 November 2023 under EO 14024 -- confirmed directly from the primary source (verbatim SDN entry embedded in ofac.treasury.gov/recent-actions/20231102, 'MOSCOW STATE TECHNICAL UNIVERSITY NAMED AFTER NE BAUMAN...[RUSSIA-EO14024]'), cross-checked against sanctions-finder.com and opensanctions.org. This is a blocking sanction on the institution itself, materially more severe than the SWIFT/banking friction already disclosed for MIPT/HSE/ITMO/Innopolis tonight, making any tuition-payment-facing publish irresponsible regardless of programme fit. Additional context (not the basis for the hold, recorded for honest disclosure per assignment instructions): a 2026 investigative-journalism consortium (Guardian/Spiegel/Le Monde/Insider/Delfi/VSquare) documented a covert GRU-linked 'Department 4/Special Training' facility and the rector's public letter supporting the Ukraine invasion, per Wikipedia's Sanctions/School of hacking and disinformation sections. notes: HELD - no payload published. IUH is a real large public technical/multidisciplinary university (est. 1956, university status 2004, ~2000 staff, three campuses: HCMC/Go Vap, Quang Ngai, Thanh Hoa) but its own official English site currently shows placeholder "The content is updating..." on both the English International page (iuh.edu.vn/en/dao-tao-quoc-te.html) and English Admissions Information page (iuh.edu.vn/en/thong-tin-tuyen-sinh.html), fetched directly 2026-07-12. The Vietnamese International Training page (iuh.edu.vn/vi/dao-tao-quoc-te.html, real content) and the dedicated international-students subsite ipe.iuh.edu.vn/en/overview/ (Incoming students section, real content, headed "FORMS OF STUDENT EXCHANGE") both confirm IUH runs only exchange (1-2 semester), internship (3-12mo) and short cultural/summer-camp programmes for incoming international students, plus outbound 1+3/2+2/3+1 transfer and joint programmes for its own Vietnamese students -- no direct-enrollment English-taught Bachelor degree admissions route for international students was found on any official page or via WebSearch (multiple EN+VI queries tried). IUH high-quality (chuong trinh chat luong cao) track is a higher-fee bilingual program for Vietnamese domestic students, not an English-medium international degree. No Vietnam DB duplicate found (queried by name/slug ILIKE industrial/IUH, zero rows, and full 40-row Vietnam list reviewed, both before and after research). No DB/media/public URL writes.
